subject: Kikaonde
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Lupusano ka luji pakachi ka biñambwanembwa ne nembelotu ikwabo?
topics: Kwesakanya ne kupusanya kwa bulumbuluzhi buji mu kyambo kya biñambwanembwa.
Akambizhe bafunda kulumbulula mwaila kyambo kya biñambwanembwa.
Epuzhe bafunda kupusanya byanembewa ne biñambwañambwa.
